CVE-2020-12862.title: An out-of-bounds read in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 may allow a  ...
CVE-2020-12862.description: An out-of-bounds read in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 may allow a malicious device connected to the same local network as the victim to read important information, such as the ASLR offsets of the program, aka GHSL-2020-082.

CVE-2020-12866.title: A NULL pointer dereference in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 allows  ...
CVE-2020-12866.description: A NULL pointer dereference in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 allows a malicious device connected to the same local network as the victim to cause a denial of service, GHSL-2020-079.
